Many GMAT journeys include plateaus or score drops. Describe a time you experienced a significant setback in your GMAT preparation and how you regained your motivation and momentum.
Beyond official GMAT materials, what unconventional or highly effective resources did you leverage during your preparation, and why did you find them particularly beneficial for a competitive score?
The GMAT is an adaptive test. How did your understanding of this adaptive algorithm influence your pacing, question approach, and overall strategy within each section?
